Onlinekorun - Brand Agency

2023Frontend Developer

Onlinekorun is a brand agency website showcasing creative services. It features an impressive portfolio gallery, client testimonials, service descriptions, and a contact system for potential clients.

🚀 Live Demo📦 View Code

Key Features

  • ✓Animated portfolio gallery
  • ✓Client testimonials
  • ✓Service showcase
  • ✓Contact form
  • ✓Blog section
  • ✓CMS integration

Challenges & Solutions

🎯

Challenge

Creating smooth animations without performance issues

💡

Solution

Used Framer Motion with will-change optimizations

🎯

Challenge

Building a flexible portfolio system

💡

Solution

Created a modular portfolio component system

🎯

Challenge

Implementing CMS for easy content updates

💡

Solution

Integrated Sanity CMS for content management

Technologies

Next.jsReactTailwindFramer MotionSanity
